creator: frase@frase.id.au
text:
On Mon, Dec 01, 2008 at 08:40:09PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of audio/asunder,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/129348 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/129348
>=20
> --=20
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Patch tested and approved.  Thanks.
